specific_question: When were the anonymous feedback forms aimed to encourage honest communication introduced to the sales team?
answer: In July 2022, the company's Sales Operations management decided to introduce an anonymous feedback system for the sales team employees to facilitate open and honest communications.
dr_question: If Elexion Automotive shifts from dealership franchising to a direct-to-customer sales model, how could it capture the benefits of the transition to drive sales and higher margins in 2027?
